skills.description: Extract audio from video files to WAV format. Use when you need to analyze audio from video, prepare audio for energy calculation, or convert video audio to standard format for processing.
Calculate per-second RMS energy from audio files. Use when you need to analyze audio volume patterns, prepare data for silence/pause detection, or create an energy profile for audio analysis tasks.

Detect pauses and silence in audio using local dynamic thresholds. Use when you need to find natural pauses in lectures, board-writing silences, or breaks between sections. Uses local context compa...
Generate compression reports for video processing. Use when you need to create structured JSON reports with duration statistics, compression ratios, and segment details after video processing.

Combine multiple segment detection results into a unified list. Use when you need to merge segments from different detectors, prepare removal lists for video processing, or consolidate detection ou...
Detect initial silence segments in audio/video using energy-based analysis. Use when you need to find low-energy periods at the start of recordings (title slides, setup time, pre-roll silence).

Process videos by removing segments and concatenating remaining parts. Use when you need to remove detected pauses/openings from videos, create highlight reels, or batch process segment removals us...
